response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform leadership, or the 15-year technical depth required for a director-level AI strategy role, with resume inconsistencies suggesting possible identity mismatch.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit with open-source GIS platform used by NGOs
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and AI-agent tooling
Strong track record of technical teaching, workshops, and community contribution
concerns: Resume name (Aisha Okonkwo) mismatches all online profiles (Szabo Bogdan), raising red flags
No clear evidence of building or leading AI/ML products or platforms as required
Experience spans many domains but lacks depth in cloud AI strategy and director-level technical leadership
